select_skills_for_prompt: select the top matching skills from the catalog using BM25 scoring against a user input string
format_skill_section: format a list of SkillMatch objects into a markdown section ready for system prompt injection
SkillMatch: create a frozen SkillMatch dataclass instance with a skill name, command, summary, prompt, and BM25 score
reset_cache: reset the cached BM25 index so the next call reloads skills from disk
select_skills_for_prompt_top_k: select up to five matching skills from the catalog by passing top_k equal to five
